race.comment: RED SPECTOR (12) progressive gelding who savaged the line from back in the field with a comfortable victory over 1215m at Grafton. Will handle the rise in grade and maps to get the right run. Top three contender. CALYPSO ROCKET (2) away only fairly and struggled first-up with a battling tenth over 1200m at Rosehill in Highway class. Comes to hand quickly and undefeated second-up. Can bounce back. KYLE (1) has returned well in his two runs back for the new yard. Dropped 200m in trip with a slashing fourth over 1000m at Wyong. Can race a touch closer and play a leading role. RIVER PAT (4) mixing her form and gets another chance at country level. Taken back early and savaged the line with a tidy fourth over 1200m at Wyong in BM64 grade. Top-four player.
